Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 10047 0 0}Thanks for coming, dude. I tend to get lost in my own head when I'm alone.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 0 -1 -1 0 0}I still haven't heard from Emiri. I think she's ignoring me...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 10084 0 0}...You know how there's been a lot of talk about Apathy Syndrome lately?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 3 -1 -1 0 0}Maybe I caught it or something...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 10092 0 0}It makes sense, right? I never feel like doing anything, and I'm always bummed out...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 3 -1 -1 0 0}I don't want to give up on Emiri, but I just don't know what else to do...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Tomochika continues to sigh...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I feel like we didn't get any closer today...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 0 -1 -1 0 0}Those eyes they have are kinda freaky. I was kinda wondering if I look like that...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Tomochika seems relieved...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I learned a little more about him today.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 10023 0 0}{f 5 13 2 30 101}Yeah, you're right, dude. I have to snap outta this...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 0 101 1 25 25}I should be thinking about my future with her... Thanks, man.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Tomochika seems like he's doing better...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I feel like we became a lot closer today.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 10062 0 0}Well, whatever happens from here on, you'll be the first to hear about it.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 1 -1 -1 0 0}Guess I'll start saving up some money... If you know of any good jobs around here, let me know.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}After talking with Tomochika for a bit,[n]I decided to go back to the dorm.[n]{f 1 1}
